untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on mean reversion detection and anticipation of future price movement direction, which requires forward-looking predictive capability beyond available indicators. The core mechanics—placing limit orders at 2.5% distance from LTP with execution uncertainty—cannot be expressed as a deterministic entry condition using only price-based and technical indicators. Signal requires explicit prediction of reversion vs. trend continuation, which is not computable from historical price data alone.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using mean reversion proxy (price vs. SMA) and volatility confirmation (ATR > baseline), but this does not capture the signal's core requirement to anticipate directional moves. The 30-minute expiry and limit order distance parameters are preserved as stop_loss_pct and hold_days_max equivalents, but the predictive essence of the signal remains untranslatable.
